enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of nostalgia and longing, reflecting on the beauty of memories.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Ennai Pol Oruvan, the song captures the emotional depth of the characters' experiences and their connection to their homeland.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of M.S. Viswanathan and P. Susheela.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were beautifully crafted by the renowned lyricist Vaali.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1978.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thangangale, the poignant lyrics by Vaali evoke a deep sense of nostalgia and longing. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions tied to one's homeland and the memories associated with it. Sung by the legendary M.S. Viswanathan and P. Susheela, it resonates with listeners, transporting them to a time filled with cherished moments. This classic piece remains a beloved favorite, celebrating the essence of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thangangale is a timeless classic that resonates with the soul, beautifully penned by the legendary Vaali. The emotive rendition by M.S. Viswanathan and P. Susheela captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. Dive into the enchanting world of Ennai Pol Oruvan and experience the magic of this unforgettable melody.
stanzaMeanings: Tomorrow's leaders, like me, are shining stars.
The divine beings live in our country, you are the protectors.
Tomorrow's leaders, like me, are shining stars.
The divine beings live in our country, you are the protectors.
Our grandfather's wisdom and uncle's guidance are the treasures we seek... every day, remember the kind leader who gave us the school.
If you wish to do good, then practice righteousness.
If love is God, then live with great love.
Even if someone does wrong, you do good; even if someone lies, you speak the truth.
Tomorrow's leaders, like me, are shining stars.
The divine beings live in our country, you are the protectors.
Tomorrow's leaders, like me, are shining stars.
The divine beings live in our country, you are the protectors.
Our grandfather's wisdom and uncle's guidance are the treasures we seek... every day, remember the kind leader who gave us the school.
Live together as one family; after unity, avoid wrongdoing.
Do good together, do good for each other, and do good for all; in the life of a brave person, victory will come.
